room.caption: [G4-2C] Some secrets are really worth coming back for, even if you don't care about 100%.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(29) global.mapTeleport=9
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh8MainA)
desertBack=instance_create(0,0,oCh8Back) desertBack.type=0; desertBack.yStart=336; desertBack.backColor=make_color_rgb(184,160,88)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(408) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
